title: Additional Appropriation Act, 2000
text:
Additional Appropriation Act, 2000
Act 23 of 2000
Published in Government Gazette 2454 on 22 December 2000
Assented to on 21 December 2000
Commenced on 22 December 2000
[This is the version of this document from 22 December 2000 and includes any amendments published up to 6 March 2026.]
ACT
To appropriate supplementary amounts of money to meet the additional financial requirements of the State during the financial year ending 31 March 2001.
BE IT ENACTED by the Parliament of the Republic of Namibia, as follows:
1. Appropriation of amounts of money for financial requirements of the State
Subject to the provisions of the State Finance Act, 1991 (Act
31 of 1991
), the amounts of money shown in the Schedule are appropriated as a charge to the State Revenue Fund for additional financial requirements of the State during the financial year ending 31 March 2001.
2. Short title
This Act shall be called the Additional Appropriation Act, 2000.
